response.overview: Southwest Airlines does ☎️+1 888-994-3769 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] not offer special senior fares or discounts for travelers aged 65 and older ☎️+1 888-994-3769 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541]. The airline officially eliminated its senior fare program on December 11, 2019. Seniors are ☎️+1 888-994-3769 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] encouraged to look for standard, low-cost "Wanna Get Away" ☎️+1 888-994-3769 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] fares on the Southwest website.
